TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_TanguhlaDinkam, title = TanguhlaDinkam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/TanguhlaDinkam} }

S.FORM: = Tanguhla/Dinkam = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Tanguhla/Dinkam. 42 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 147 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 99% niqan 145 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 1% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 82%, Rukai 1%, Tayal 1%, Cou 9%, Hla'alua 4%, Amis 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = taŋuħla/dinkam = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ taŋuħla/dinkam. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ɾukai *%, tajal *%, ʦou *%, ħla'alua *%, amis *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Tanguhla/Dinkam = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Tanguhla/Dinkam. 42 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 147 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 99% niqan 145 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 1% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 82%, Rukai 1%, Tayal 1%, Cou 9%, Hla'alua 4%, Amis 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = taŋuħla/dinkam = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ taŋuħla/dinkam. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ɾukai *%, tajal *%, ʦou *%, ħla'alua *%, amis *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
